title: PhD Programs - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
PhD Programs - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
PhD Programs at Khoury College
Innovate and lead as you pursue your PhD
Khoury College of Computer Sciences —
ranked #12 by CSRankings
— provides you with a variety of options to pursue a PhD in CS, collaborating with top researchers in the field at one of the country’s leading technology hubs. Plus, our emphasis on interdisciplinary education across multiple Northeastern colleges provides opportunities not available anywhere else. Khoury College PhD programs include:
PhD in Computer Science
PhD in Cybersecurity
PhD in Network Science
PhD in Personal Health Informatics
Accepted students: Open House March 13-15
We’re excited to invite accepted PhD students to our Boston campus next month. Learn more about our
PhD Open House event
.
Learn more about our innovative and growing PhD programs
Highly engaged faculty, abundant opportunities for cross-college research collaboration, and top facilities are among the many reasons more than 370 students are enrolled across Khoury College’s four PhD programs.
Khoury Statistics
370
PhD students enrolled, fall 2024
103
Tenure, tenure-track faculty with joint appointments across campuses
98.4%
Employment rate nine months after graduation
Collaborate with top researchers in state-of-the art facilities
Khoury College research is pushing the boundaries of computer technology, applying research discoveries to real-world challenges. For example, our faculty are conducting cutting-edge research in areas like AI-powered disease diagnosis, developing secure network systems for the internet of things, and exploring the mathematical foundations of computer science — tackling the profound question of computational limits on what computers can do.
Researchers at Khoury College make transformative contributions to many fields within computer science, collaborating, publishing, leading national and international projects, and participating in top conferences. There is a strong emphasis on real-world applications of CS at Khoury College — combined with an ethos of interdisciplinary work both within the college and beyond — that puts you at the center of
collaborative research that makes a difference.
Career prospects across industry and academia
Our computer science PhD graduates have found prestigious positions in both industry and academia:
Tenure-track faculty (Michigan, Indiana, UC Irvine, UMass Boston)
Postdoc research scientists (Harvard, UCLA, University of Paris)
Senior software engineers and industry leaders (Akamai, Google, Microsoft, Mozilla)
Internships at leading tech companies and organizations
As a Khoury College PhD student, you can gain industry exposure, build important connections, and form new perspectives on the impact of your work through internship opportunities at leading companies including:
Google
JP Morgan
Inria
Illumio
Meta
Microsoft Research
NASA
